title: Mine Strike | CS 2
description:
Counter Strike 2 in minecraft 1.20.1!
Map with raid simulators, 1 vs 1, 2 vs 2, bomb planting for 5 vs 5.
You will get the best experience with the weapon mod TaCZ.
body:
# **IF YOUR SCREEN FREEZES IN THE GAME, DISABLE Rubidium AND USE OPTIFINE**

# MineStrike: Counter-Strike in Minecraft!

Get ready for the incredible thrill of a Counter-Strike style shooter, brought directly into Minecraft! MineStrike is a unique build for version 1.20.1 that combines dynamic gunfights, tactical elements, and the familiar atmosphere of your favorite game, all spiced up with a cozy blocky world.

##  What awaits you in MineStrike:

Real Gunfights with [TaCZ] Timeless and Classic Zero: Experience intense battles with detailed weapons and realistic shooting mechanics. Choose your arsenal and dominate the battlefield!

Fortified Buildings with Security Craft: Build impregnable fortresses and defensive structures using advanced security systems. Unlock new tactical possibilities for defending your base or infiltrating enemy territory.

Perfect Atmosphere with MrCrayfish's Furniture Mod: Add style to maps with an extensive set of decorative elements from Macaw's. Unique locations for exciting battles or cozy shelters for your team.

## Game Modes:

Raid Simulator: Team up with friends in the thrilling "one or two raid, others defend" mode. Test your skills in both offense and defense, developing strategies and coordinating team actions.

1v1, 2v2, 1v1v1v1v1 Duels: Hone your skills in intense battles against opponents using a variety of weapons. Show who the true champion in combat is!

Survival mode(PVE): gradual passage of waves of enemies, receiving better weapons at the same time.

Rainbow Mode: is a tactical mode inspired by Rainbow Six Siege. Terrorists fortify their positions and can block passages with furniture, while special forces must capture the objective or rescue the hostages.

### MineStrike is not just a modpack, it's a new shooter. Gather your friends, choose your side, and show what you're capable of!

## How to open file .mrpack without modrinth launcher?
Download X Minecraft Launcher or its analogs that support .mrpack

## My contacts for sending a bug report:
[Telegram: Pomidorhs](https://t.me/Pomidorhs)

Discrod: pomidorhs

## How long will the project continue to develop?
I have a specific list of things I want to add. And until it ends, support will continue.
Here is part of that list:
A new map for battle royale,
Find a replacement for the current explosive mod,
And some other things that are questionable
